text.title: Edge and CDN Strategy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: CDN + careful cache-key design; auth in cache-key if personalised
Edge for auth + WAF; cache_ttl=0; signed-identity handoff
regional shielding only; no edge compute outside compliant region
skip-this-methodology — preconditions in "Applies If" not satisfied

example.note: Workload shape? → matches branch "shape == static_assets_global" → conclusion ref=r2-origin-shielding-on
